entry_rationale: NEAR-DECIDED: YES — KXLOWTDEN-26MAR13-T44 is priced at 94¢ into a 06:00 UTC close, and the market only loses if the official Denver low slips below 45°F in the final hours. The remaining payout is 6¢ to resolution.

FORCED_FALLBACK — STRONGLY FAVORED: BUY NO because KSFO is 62.1°F at 1:56 PM PDT and the NWS point forecast still only calls for a high near 66°F, leaving about 6°F of cushion below the 72°F YES threshold. NO is 0.96, inside the target band. citeturn7view0turn8view0

STRONGLY FAVORED: NO — the market only loses if front-month WTI settles below $85.00 on March 13, and Kalshi still prices NO at 93¢ with a 1¢ spread. The combination of deep liquidity and an objective exchange-based settlement makes this the cleanest remaining non-crypto, non-speaking setup in the scan.

STRONGLY FAVORED: NO on the $91 to $91.99 band for Mar. 13, 2026 was the least-risk remaining Tier 4 candidate because current WTI futures were about $94.42 and this contract only loses if Friday’s official front-month settlement lands inside that exact $1 band. Supporting Evidence: Investing.com showed WTI futures at $94.42 with a same-day range of $88.89 to $95.96, so the target band sat roughly $2.4 to $3.4 below current pricing, while the provided Kalshi market data already priced NO at 0.96 and YES at 0.05. Resolution Source: Coinbase’s event page states that the Mar. 13, 2026 WTI event is outcome-verified by ICE, providing a clear mechanical settlement source for the front-month settle price. Risk Checklist: passed clear resolution source, no formal appeals or review path, and strong position via narrow-band structure plus current price cushion; recent corroboration is available from live WTI pricing today. Risk Level: LOW; this market was selected as the single lowest-risk available candidate. Remaining Risks: oil remains headline-sensitive and Friday settlement could still move into 91.xx, but no formal challenge or discretionary-resolution risk was identified. Sources: https://www.coinbase.com/en-in/predictions/event/KXWTIW-26MAR13 ; https://www.investing.com/commodities/crude-oil . citeturn8search3turn4search1
